collapse_rate_atlas_microgrid.goal: Ensure a tiny hardware grid already separates more than one branch class.

core_shell_collapse_ladder.goal: Recover shield > open > wrong ordering with low shell sensitivity for the shield branch.

cross_platform_universality_test.goal: Package the same reduced branch-ordering circuit family on two hardware classes.

quantum_neutrinosphere_analog.goal: Hold gross outer leakage roughly fixed while degrading inner Bell structure in the mismatched branch.

shell_only_visibility_test.goal: Change shell visibility strongly while keeping the interior Bell proxy stable.

shock_revival_threshold_simulator.goal: Find a small AHS pulse family with a nontrivial edge-loss span across a narrow parameter sweep.
